---
title: "Q10 — Servicing times: P(mean > 68)"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Q10
mu <- 95; sigma <- 60; n <- 30
se <- sigma/sqrt(n)
z <- (68 - mu)/se
p_value <- 1 - pnorm(z)
z; p_value

xs <- seq(-4,4,length=400); ys <- dnorm(xs)
plot(xs, ys, type='l', main='Q10: P(mean > 68)', ylab='Density')
abline(v=z, col='red')
polygon(c(z, xs[xs>z], max(xs)), c(0, ys[xs>z], 0), col=rgb(1,0,0,0.3))
```
